name: Fresh Peach Cobbler with Cheese Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
COBBLER:
1. Place peaches in a greased 13x9x2-inch baking dish.
2. Mix sugar, cornstarch, and salt; sprinkle evenly over peaches.
3. Sprinkle lemon juice and almond extract on top of the peaches.
4. Dot with butter.
5. Place in a preheated, hot oven (400 degrees) until hot and bubbly, about 15 minutes.
CHEESE BISCUITS:
1. Measure biscuit mix into a small bowl.
2. Stir grated cheese into the mixture.
3. Add melted butter and enough milk to make soft dough.
4. Stir with a fork until well blended.
5. Remove peach mixture from the oven. Stir to mix sugar.
6. Drop dough onto hot peaches, making 12 biscuits.
7. Replace in the hot oven (400 degrees) until golden brown, about 20 minutes.
NOTE:
This recipe is excellent with fresh apples using cinnamon instead of almond extract.
